settings.heading: Cards that earn their place on the counter.
settings.body: Printed on 350gsm matte stock. Subtly branded with your business name and logo. Designed to look like part of your space — not a hand-made printout.

settings.text: Designed and printed in Perth, WA

settings.heading: Stickers that work wherever your customers stand.
settings.body: Waterproof vinyl, scratch-resistant, and finished to look premium. Stick on windows, EFTPOS terminals, menus, receipts — anywhere a customer's eyes already go.

settings.quote: We went from 40 to 180 reviews in three months. Easiest marketing we've ever done.

settings.quote: Looks professional on the counter. Worth every cent.

settings.question: How do I send my Google review link?
settings.answer: After you order, we'll email a short form. Paste your Google Business review URL — done. Takes about 60 seconds.

settings.question: How long does setup take?
settings.answer: We design your QR code, send a proof, and dispatch within 48 hours of approval. Most orders arrive within 4 business days.

settings.question: Can I add my logo?
settings.answer: Yes — free, on all cards and most sticker sizes. Just upload it during checkout or email it to us afterwards.

settings.question: Do you ship Australia-wide?
settings.answer: Yes. 2-4 business days via Australia Post tracked. Free shipping on all orders.

settings.question: Are the QR codes permanent?
settings.answer: Yes. They link directly to your Google review page and never expire. No subscriptions, no app required.
